query:
-- Step 1: Add labels column
ALTER TABLE intake_records ADD COLUMN labels TEXT DEFAULT '[]' AFTER callbackHandlerName;

-- Step 2: Backfill after_hours label (calls received outside Mon-Fri 8am-6pm)
UPDATE intake_records
SET labels = JSON_ARRAY('after_hours')
WHERE (HOUR(createdAt) < 8 OR HOUR(createdAt) >= 18 OR DAYOFWEEK(createdAt) IN (1,7))
  AND (labels IS NULL OR labels = '[]');

-- Step 3: Backfill direct_voicemail label (voicemails on handler extensions, not the IVR)
UPDATE intake_records
SET labels = CASE
  WHEN labels = '[]' OR labels IS NULL THEN JSON_ARRAY('direct_voicemail')
  ELSE JSON_ARRAY_APPEND(labels, '$', 'direct_voicemail')
END
WHERE routingMethod = 'extension';

-- Step 4: Add weekend label to after_hours records that are also on weekends
UPDATE intake_records
SET labels = JSON_ARRAY_APPEND(labels, '$', 'weekend')
WHERE DAYOFWEEK(createdAt) IN (1,7)
  AND JSON_CONTAINS(labels, '"after_hours"');
